headline: Welltower's Q1 FFO Beat Estimates on Strong SHO NOI Growth
summary: WELL tops Q1 FFO estimates as SHO NOI surges, occupancy improves and 2026 guidance increases on strong operating leverage.

headline: Welltower 3.0 Recasts Senior Housing With Rental Focus And Amica Deal
summary: Welltower (NYSE:WELL) has launched a capital allocation and operational overhaul under a refreshed platform called “Welltower 3.0.” The company is repositioning as a pure-play rental housing platform focused on aging seniors. Recent moves include substantial acquisitions such as Amica Senior Living and a new incentive structure that ties management more closely to shareholder outcomes. For investors watching senior housing, NYSE:WELL sits at the intersection of real estate and long term...
